endpoints.name: Available Companies
endpoints.description: Get a list of the traded companies that polygon.io streams. Company includes some details about the company which we hope to add more to soon.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY.

endpoints.name: Available Currencies
endpoints.description: Get a list of the currencies that polygon.io streams.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY.

endpoints.name: Historic Aggregates
endpoints.description: Get historic aggregations for a symbol.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{SIZE}} with a real size. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date. Replace {{SYMBOL}} with a real symbol.

endpoints.name: Historic Forex Ticks
endpoints.description: Get historic ticks for a currency pair. Example for **USD/JPY** the from would be **USD** and to would be **JPY**. The date formatted like **2017-6-22**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{TO}} with a real to. Replace {{FROM}} with a real from. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date.

endpoints.name: Historic Quotes
endpoints.description: Get historic quotes for a symbol.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date. Replace {{SYMBOL}} with a real symbol.

endpoints.name: Historic Trades
endpoints.description: Get historic trades for a symbol.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date. Replace {{SYMBOL}} with a real symbol.

endpoints.name: Last Trade for a Currency Pair
endpoints.description: Get Last Trade Tick for a Currency Pair.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{TO}} with a real to. Replace {{FROM}} with a real from.

endpoints.name: Last Trade for a Symbol
endpoints.description: Get the last trade for a given stock.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{SYMBOL}} with a real symbol.

endpoints.name: Last Quote for a Currency Pair
endpoints.description: Get Last Quote Tick for a Currency Pair.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{TO}} with a real to. Replace {{FROM}} with a real from.

endpoints.name: Last Quote for a Symbol
endpoints.description: Get the last quote tick for a given stock.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{POLYGON_API_KEY}} with your POLYGON API KEY. Replace {{SYMBOL}} with a real symbol.
